message:
Remove unnecessary f-string prefix from static string in audit report

The pattern audit report script used an f-string for a line containing
no interpolated variables ("# Pattern Audit Report"). Converted to a
plain string literal to eliminate the redundant f-prefix linter warning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -52,7 +52,7 @@ def main():
 
     # Write report
     with open(OUTPUT_FILE, 'w') as f:
-        f.write(f"# Pattern Audit Report\n")
+        f.write("# Pattern Audit Report\n")
         f.write(f"Generated: {datetime.datetime.now().isoformat()}\n\n")
         for path in sorted(all_findings.keys()):
             f.write(f"## `{path}`\n\n")
